what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a specific channel board item.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme to identify a board item
conventions: uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
target references an external board item by URI
notes: A metadata stub recording that a board item is attached in the dragnet-development channel.
purpose_vs_actual: The file records an attachment reference, which matches the purpose implied by its metadata fields.
intention_signals: To create a durable, file-local record associating an attachment with a specific board item in a channel.
contribution: Provides a persistent attachment record containing the target board item URI and creation timestamp for channel memory retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata file att-4f45e27b linking a board item in the dragnet-development channel with a creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record a board-item attachment reference in a channel memory ledger.
